summary: Completed full backend and frontend testing of Robokoshal/InnovateR platform. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend loads correctly with hero section, stat cards, nav, and all sections working. Admin login modal works, JWT auth succeeds, admin panel at /admin is functional with all 5 tabs (Users, Team, Portfolio, Programs, Testimonials).

ui_bugs.issue: Logo in the navbar shows as small generic pixel icons instead of branded InnovateR text/logo. May need a proper SVG or text-based logo.
No floating action button (FAB) at bottom-right after login. Instead, admin actions are accessible via the 'Robokoshal Admin' dropdown in the navbar. If FAB was intended, it is not implemented.

issues: Overall design is clean, futuristic light theme. Stat cards, hero section, CTAs all look well-designed. No major contrast issues.

action_items: Consider adding a proper InnovateR branded logo/SVG to navbar (currently shows generic pixel icons)
If FAB button at bottom-right was a design requirement, it needs to be implemented - currently admin navigation is via navbar dropdown
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 494 lines - acceptable for now but approaching the 700-line limit
JWT auth uses Bearer tokens stored in localStorage ('auth_token' key) - works correctly
All MongoDB _id fields properly excluded via doc_to_dict() helper
Seed data is idempotent - admin password update logic correctly handles existing admin
CORS configured with allow_credentials=False and allow_origins='*' - this is correct since JWT Bearer tokens are used (not cookies), no CORS credential issues expected
No brute-force lockout after failed login attempts - security concern for production

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all major flows working, minor logo display issue

seed_data_creation: Seed data auto-created on startup: 4 team members, 5 portfolio items, 3 programs, 3 finance configs, 26 lab items, 3 testimonials, 1 admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 100% passing. Frontend working well. Auth uses JWT Bearer stored in localStorage as 'auth_token'. Admin panel at /admin works. Finance dashboard shows tabs B.Tech IRS, Diploma, Partner Diploma with sliders and charts. Lab Planner shows categories with Lean/Recommended/Flagship presets. Main potential improvement: navbar logo display and optional FAB button.
